dj_text: VINE BOOM INTO Jolene (Bardcore | Medieval Style)! Traditionnel Musette (Medieval Cover) was just the warm-up!
commercial_text: You've been listening for a while now. Your family misses you. Just kidding, they're also listening.
hijack_text: Welcome to Quiet FM from the Null Kosmos. Shhhh.
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: Jolene (Bardcore | Medieval Style)
